intro.zh_cn: 2016年哔哩哔哩拜年纪中的原创歌曲 ，并由虚拟歌手乐正绫演唱、洛天依和声。以《西游记》为题材，视频中所有角色均由不同的VOCALOID虚拟歌手和歌曲创作人员扮演，其原版视频因为热血的旋律与颠覆的动漫形象，在哔哩哔哩弹幕网上的播放量已突破1000万次，达成了VOCALOID中文神话曲的成就
intro.zh_tw: 2016年嗶哩嗶哩拜年紀中的原創歌曲 ，並由虛擬歌手樂正綾演唱、洛天依和聲。以《西遊記》為題材，影片中所有角色均由不同的VOCALOID虛擬歌手和歌曲創作人員扮演，因原版影片中熱血的旋律與顛覆的動漫形象，在B站上的播放量已突破1000萬，達成VOCALOID中文神話曲的成就
intro.en: An original song from the 2016 Bilibili New Year's Gala, performed by the virtual singer Yuezheng Ling with harmonies by Luo Tianyi. Themed after "Journey to the West", all characters in the music video are portrayed by various VOCALOID virtual singers and the song's creators. Due to its high-energy melody and subversive anime imagery, the original video has surpassed 10 million views on Bilibili, achieving the status of a "VOCALOID Chinese Myth Song"

intro.zh_tw: 翻唱自瑞典組合BWO的《Sunshine In The Rain》，由崔惟楷重新填詞
intro.zh_cn: 翻唱自瑞典组合BWO的《Sunshine In The Rain》，由崔惟楷重新填词
intro.en: This is a cover of the song "Sunshine In The Rain" by the Swedish group BWO, with new lyrics written by Luke Tsui

intro.en: Featuring dog bark samples from Border Collie Viper, the track was released on May 7, 2024, and had its live premiere at the 'Zerlina's Earth Party' stage on May 31.

intro.zh_cn: 本曲由雨狸于2019-10-31投稿至哔哩哔哩站，是由虚拟歌手洛天依与乐正绫演唱的VOCALOID中文原创歌曲，被列为殿堂曲
intro.en: Submitted to Bilibili by Yu Li on October 31, 2019, this is a VOCALOID Chinese original song performed by virtual singers Luo Tianyi and Yuezhengling, and has been officially recognized as a "Palace-tier Song" (Hall of Fame)

intro.en: A VOCALOID Chinese Palace-tier song, this original track was created by T2o and uploaded to Bilibili in 2015. It marks the composer's very first VOCALOID original release

intro.zh_tw: 此為根據VOCALOID中文原創歌曲《噬光者與發光體的愛情》改編的版本，由原詞作雨狸微調歌詞。原歌曲於2021年發布，為VOCALOID中文殿堂曲
intro.zh_cn: 此为根据VOCALOID中文原创歌曲《噬光者与发光体的爱情》改编的版本，由原词作雨狸微调歌词。原歌曲于2021年发布，为VOCALOID中文殿堂曲
intro.en: This version is an adaptation of the VOCALOID Chinese original song "The Love Between a Light-Eater and a Luminous Body," with lyrics slightly adjusted by the original lyricist, Yu Li. The original track was released in 2021 and is recognized as a VOCALOID Chinese Palace-tier song

intro.en: This song became famous due to the 'Elegant Penguin' meme on Douyin

intro.zh_tw: 因抖音上檸檬叉編舞聞名，實際上混了兩首歌曲
intro.zh_cn: 因抖音上柠檬叉编舞闻名，实际上混了两首歌曲

intro.en: The version performed by SkyGrass is likely a cover based on the composer JJ Lin's own rendition of the song
intro.zh_tw: 天草演唱的應是作曲者林俊傑自己演繹的版本
intro.zh_cn: 天草演唱的应是作曲者林俊杰自己演绎的版本

intro.zh_tw: 抖音掃腿舞原曲
intro.zh_cn: 抖音扫腿舞原曲
intro.en: The original song of the Douyin "Leg Sweep Dance"

intro.zh_tw: 本首歌及其由DJ馬師與aespa "Rich Man"混搭的版本為抖音上熱門舞蹈挑戰背景音樂，被稱為 "寧藝卓進行曲"
intro.zh_cn: 本首歌及其由DJ马师与aespa "Rich Man"混搭的版本为抖音上热门舞蹈挑战背景音乐，被称为 "宁艺卓进行曲"
intro.en: This song, along with its mashup version featuring DJ Ma Shi and aespa's 'Rich Man,' became a viral background track for dance challenges on Douyin, earning the nickname 'Ningning's March'
